public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as ritual attendant.
appearance: Ritual garments, symbolic tokens, and carefully maintained devotional detail make the role legible at a glance.
manner: Carries devotional seriousness shaped by rite, memory, and public expectation. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a ritual attendant still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ritual attendant in and around Aurora Light Cathedral, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Aurora Light Cathedral workable through the obligations of ritual attendant while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must ensure that rite remains trustworthy even when civic pressure tries to convert it into mere administration. Around Aurora Light Cathedral, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of ritual attendant visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Mira Vale may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.
Any alliance with Mira Vale can expose the party to taboo, doctrine, or institutional expectation centered on Aurora Light Cathedral.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V30_3 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Mira Vale immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Aurora Light Cathedral: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts

first_impression: Mira Vale presents as Carries devotional seriousness shaped by rite, memory, and public expectation. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a ritual attendant still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Ritual Attendant, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
what_they_refuse: Mira Vale refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Ritual Attendant too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Mira Vale can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Mira Vale adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Mira Vale is Known locally through day-to-day work as ritual attendant. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Ritual Attendant.
